name: ajay-cc-plugins
description: Focused, zero-config plugins for the Claude Code harness.

plugins.name: subagent-verifier
plugins.description: Trust subagent output: make delegated agents return cited, structured findings, then independently re-check every citation before you act.

plugins.name: hook-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnose why your Claude Code hooks silently fail: lint settings.json, dry-run each hook against a synthetic event, and flag the known footguns with copy-pasteable fixes.
